name: Zerodha Trade Log Pattern Searcher
scenario: Zerodha's operations team needs to search 10GB daily trade logs for error patterns. Current String.indexOf() times out on adversarial inputs. Build a KMP-powered search engine.

core.description: buildLPS(String pattern): O(m) failure function. Test: 'AABAAB' → [0,1,0,1,2,3], 'ABCABC' → [0,0,0,1,2,3].
kmpSearch(String text, String pattern): first occurrence index. O(n+m). Test: 'mississippi','issip' → 4. 'aaaaa','bba' → -1.
kmpFindAll(String text, String pattern): all occurrences (overlapping). O(n+m). Test: 'AAAA','AA' → [0,1,2].
countNonOverlapping(String text, String pattern): non-overlapping count. Test: 'AAAAAA','AA' → 3.
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): LPS correct for AABAAB, search 'issip' → 4, findAll AAAA/AA → 3 results, countNonOverlapping AAAAAA/AA → 3.
README: explains O(n+m) vs O(nm) with adversarial example.

bonus.description: repeatedSubstringPattern(String s): O(n) via LPS. Test: 'abab' → true, 'aba' → false.
isRotation(String s1, String s2): O(n) via KMP on doubled string.
shortestPalindrome(String s): O(n) via KMP on s+'#'+reverse(s). Test: 'aacecaaa' → 'aaacecaaa'.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. LPS algorithm: start with len=0, i=1. If pattern[i]==pattern[len]: lps[i]=len+1, len++, i++. If mismatch and len>0: len=lps[len-1] (try shorter — don't change i). If mismatch and len==0: lps[i]=0, i++. KMP search: on mismatch with j>0 → j=lps[j-1] (never backtrack i). On j==m (full match): record i-m as match position, then j=lps[j-1] for overlapping or j=0 for non-overlapping. Overlapping: after match j=lps[m-1]. Non-overlapping: after match j=0. isRotation: s2 in (s1+s1) — all rotations of s1 appear as substrings of s1+s1.
